Project Hail Mary

Author: Andy Weir

Publisher: Ballantine Books

Year: 2021

ISBN-13: 9780593135204

ISBN-10: 0593135202

Language: English [en]

Pages: 476

Extension: epub

Filesize: 1.2MB

Ryland Grace is the sole survivor on a desperate, last-chance mission. If he fails, humanity and the Earth itself will perish. He's drifting through space with only the company of an alien.
